'''Anniha Nega''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] who became one [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant's]] premier [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunters]] by his early twenties.

==Biography==
Active during the last [[Standard decade/Legends|decades]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]],<ref name="AnnihaCSWE">{{CSWECite|II|368|Nega, Anniha}}</ref> Anniha Nega was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Soldier/Legends|soldier]] in his early twenties. He was also one of the top [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunters]] and [[Assassin/Legends|assassins]] operating out of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]. Though he built a top-notch reputation in spite of his relative youth, Nega did not do many of the tasks on his falsified [[Bounty Hunters' Guild/Legends|Bounty Hunters' Guild]] [[Death/Legends|kill]] list, a fact concealed from his employers. Even so, he found no shortage of work, being used by [[Crime lord/Legends|crime lords]] [[Volven Roxe]] and [[Quetemoor the Sub-Elder]], and politicians in Coruscant's [[Senate District/Legends|Senate District]].<ref name="CatCW">''[[Coruscant and the Core Worlds]]''</ref> 

==Personality and traits==
Though his kill list claimed things he did not do, Nega believed that his legitimate kills would soon outnumber his fake ones.<ref name="CatCW" />  

==Skills and abilities==
Nega's talent for tracking was almost primal. A bounty hunter, he was proficient in the use of [[Blaster pistol/Legends|blaster pistols]] and [[Blaster rifle/Legends|rifles]], and heavy, simple and [[Vibro-weapon/Legends|vibro]] weapons. <ref name="CatCW" />

==Equipment==
The bounty hunter wore combat [[Glove/Legends|gloves]] and [[Ithullian war armor]] under a woven desert [[Poncho/Legends|poncho]] to preserve his mysterious identity. Weapons used by Nega included an [[ion pistol]], a [[Blaster carbine/Legends|blaster carbine]], and a [[Force pike/Legends|force pike]]. He also used a tracking device and the ''[[Flare]]'', a [[Z-95 Headhunter/Legends|Z-95 Headhunter]].<ref name="CatCW" />
